title: OmniEVA: Embodied Versatile Planner via Task-Adaptive 3D-Grounded and Embodiment-aware Reasoning
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have advanced embodied intelligence, but two key gaps remain: a Geometric Adaptability Gap, where models with only 2D inputs or hard-coded 3D geometry injection struggle with spatial generalization, and an Embodiment Constraint Gap, where prior work often ignores the physical constraints and capacities of real robots. OmniEVA introduces two innovations: (1) a Task-Adaptive 3D Grounding mechanism using a gated router to perform explicit selective regulation of 3D fusion, and (2) an Embodiment-Aware Reasoning framework that incorporates task goals and embodiment constraints into the reasoning loop. Results show state-of-the-art general embodied reasoning performance across multiple benchmarks.
note: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026. First submitted Sept 2025, last revised Jan 2026.

opensource.summary: 代码和 benchmark 尚未发布。项目页面标注 'coming soon'，论文 Reproducibility Statement 声明'Source code and benchmark datasets will be released upon acceptance'。GitHub 组织 OmniEVA 已存在但仅有 github.io 页面，无实际代码仓库。
